title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.913 - Treasurer to report on bond transactions to general assembly
text:
108.913.  Treasurer to report on bond transactions to general assembly. — The state treasurer shall furnish to the general assembly, from time to time, a detailed statement of the total amount of bonds and the total amount of the proceeds thereof, the expense of collection and the amounts used to carry out the provisions of sections 108.900 to 108.914.
(L. 1982 2nd Ex. Sess. S.B. 1 § 14) 
Effective 12-20-82
